---
title: "Political, religious, and love poems from the Archbishop of Canterbury’s Lambeth MS. no. 306"
---

## Political, religious, and love poems from the Archbishop of Canterbury’s Lambeth MS. no. 306

**Author:** F. J. Furnivall
**Date:** 1866
**Imprint:** London: EETS

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
